zh.lifeSummary: 當William Jackson於1470年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林時，他的父親William Jackson33歲，母親Margaret Percy13歲。他和Elizabeth Jackson至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1571年10月26日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Jackson于1470年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林时，他的父亲William Jackson33岁，母亲Margaret Percy13岁。他和Elizabeth Jackson至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1571年10月26日在英国英格兰倫敦享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Jackson was born in 1470, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Jackson, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Percy, was 13. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Jackson. He died on 26 October 1571, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Jackson est né en 1470, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Jackson, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Percy, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Jackson. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1571, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Jackson 1470 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Jackson 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Percy 13. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Jackson mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1571 im Alter von 101 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Jackson è nato il nel 1470 nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Jackson, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Percy, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Jackson. Morì il 26 ottobre 1571, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Jackson(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Jackson(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Percy(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Jackson(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.
